hero.tagline: Holistic healing through the gentle power of Homeopathy — restoring balance, naturally.
hero.designation: Medical Officer, AYUSH Dept., Govt. of Bihar

about.title: About Dr. Savita Kumari
about.biography: Dedicated homeopathic physician serving the community at Khujhwa, Siwan, Bihar under the AYUSH Department, Government of Bihar.
about.holisticApproach: Holistic approach treating the whole person, not just symptoms
about.individualizedCare: Individualized treatment plans tailored to each patient's constitution
about.principle1: Treating the root cause, not just symptoms
about.principle2: Personalized remedies based on individual constitution
about.bioParagraph1: Dr. Savita Kumari is a BHMS doctor (B.Sc. + BHMS) specializing in holistic homeopathic medicine. She combines traditional homeopathic principles with modern diagnostics, and is also qualified to prescribe allopathic medicines — giving patients the best of both systems.
about.bioParagraph2: Currently serving as Medical Officer at PHC Khujhwa, Siwan under the AYUSH Department, Govt. of Bihar — providing free homeopathic healthcare to rural communities. She also runs her private practice at Saubhagya Clinic, Village Pipra, Siwan.
about.bioParagraph3: Her philosophy: treat the person, not just symptoms. Every prescription is tailored to the patient's unique constitution, lifestyle, and emotional well-being for lasting health.

services.title: Our Services & Treatments
services.subtitle: Comprehensive homeopathic care for the whole family, treating the person — not just the disease.
services.ayushApproved: All treatments follow AYUSH-approved homeopathic protocols
services.ayushNote: All treatments follow AYUSH-approved protocols. Also qualified to prescribe allopathic medicines.
services.consultationNote: Available for in-person consultation at Khujhwa, Siwan & online video consultation
services.chronicDiseasesDesc: Holistic management of long-term conditions like diabetes, hypertension, arthritis, and thyroid disorders through constitutional homeopathic treatment.
services.chronicDiseasesApproach: Individualized constitutional remedies targeting the root cause, combined with lifestyle guidance. Regular follow-ups track symptom progression and remedy adjustment over 3-6 month treatment cycles.
services.skinDisordersDesc: Treatment of eczema, psoriasis, acne, urticaria, and fungal infections using safe, side-effect-free remedies.
services.skinDisordersApproach: Detailed case-taking to identify miasmatic background. Internal remedies address the immune-level cause while external applications provide symptomatic relief. No steroid-based treatments.
services.digestiveIssuesDesc: Relief for IBS, acidity, constipation, bloating, and liver disorders through gentle homeopathic medicines.
services.digestiveIssuesApproach: Focus on restoring gut motility and digestive fire through carefully selected remedies based on modalities (time, food triggers, emotional state). Dietary counseling included.
services.respiratoryAilmentsDesc: Effective treatment for asthma, sinusitis, bronchitis, allergies, and recurrent respiratory infections without dependency.
services.respiratoryAilmentsApproach: Constitutional treatment strengthens respiratory immunity. Acute remedies manage flare-ups. Emphasis on reducing inhaler dependency gradually through deep-acting remedies and breathing exercises.
services.womensHealthDesc: Specialized care for PCOS, menstrual irregularities, fertility support, menopause, and hormonal imbalances.
services.womensHealthApproach: Hormonal balance restoration through individualized remedies. Treatment addresses underlying endocrine disruptions while managing symptoms. Safe during pregnancy and breastfeeding with appropriate remedy selection.
services.childHealthDesc: Gentle, safe treatments for recurrent infections, growth issues, behavioral concerns, and childhood allergies.
services.childHealthApproach: Sweet-tasting globules children love. Focus on building natural immunity rather than suppression. Treatment for teething troubles, colic, ADHD tendencies, and recurrent tonsillitis.
services.mentalWellnessDesc: Support for anxiety, depression, insomnia, stress-related disorders, and emotional well-being through mind-body remedies.
services.mentalWellnessApproach: Deep-acting constitutional remedies that address mental-emotional symptoms at their core. Complementary approach alongside conventional therapy when needed. Focus on sleep restoration and stress resilience.
